description: Style Note Crafted with age old printing and dyeing traditions, each piece from fabindia is created by artisans from villages nestled in the green valleys of India. The brand considers ancient fabric weaving and dyeing techniques that are dying out and infuses them with new life by providing these craftsmen a viable market. This patiala is a unique piece fashioned to please not only those who love the simple life but also the style-consious global citizen. It looks great when styled with ethnic kurtas or with an understated pastel hued top and cardi.  Product Details Pinkish red tie-dyed patiala with pleats below the waist, has a drawstring wasit and slightly tapering hems Material and Care Cotton Hand wash in cold water Use mild detergent Dry in shade Size Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
